programme.desc: As Jan renovates the condo, Michael confronts his growing debt every way he can, which includes pressuring his employees for a loan. Pam and Jim spend a night at Dwight's family farm, which was converted into a bed and breakfast.

programme.title: The Office: Money
programme.desc: As Jan renovates the condo, Michael confronts his growing debt every way he can, which includes pressuring his employees for a loan. Pam and Jim spend a night at Dwight's family farm, which was converted into a bed and breakfast.

programme.title: The Office: Local Ad
programme.desc: Michael jumps at the chance to display his creativity in an upcoming Dunder Mifflin ad. Meanwhile, Dwight explores the online world of Second Life.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Wars
programme.desc: Karen tries to woo Stanley away from Scranton, and Michael fights back by dragging her ex into the war.

programme.title: The Office: Survivor Man
programme.desc: Michael goes on a deep woods adventure; Jim tries to revolutionize the office birthday party.

programme.title: The Office: The Deposition
programme.desc: Michael finds himself between a rock and a hard place when Jan sues Dunder Mifflin and Michael is deposed as a witness.

programme.title: The Office: Dinner Party
programme.desc: Pam and Jim have run out of excuses and are forced to go to Jan and Michael's house for dinner. When Andy and Angela are also invited, Dwight's jealousy gets the better of him.

programme.title: The Office: The Chair Model
programme.desc: Michael becomes obsessed with a woman shown in an office supply catalogue. Meanwhile, Kevin and Andy team up to win back their stolen parking spaces. They quickly end up in an all-out war with the bosses of the five business of the office park.

programme.title: The Office: Night Out
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight decide to surprise Ryan in New York for a night of clubbing. Meanwhile, the Scranton branch is upset when they find out they have to come in on a Saturday for Ryan's website project. Jim's plan to save them has unexpected results.

programme.title: The Office: Did I Stutter?
programme.desc: When Stanley snaps at Michael during a meeting, Michael tries to give him an attitude adjustment. Meanwhile, Dwight buys Andy's car and Pam deals with an unexpected inconvenience after spending the night at Jim's.

programme.title: The Office: Job Fair
programme.desc: Jim tries to land his biggest client ever with Andy and Kevin's help. Meanwhile, Michael sets up a booth at a local job fair being held at Pam's alma mater, to find the best and brightest for Dunder-Mifflin's summer internship.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: Dec 14, 2020
programme.desc: President Trump gets a reality check, Desi Lydic and Roy Wood Jr. host a voter suppression game show, and Pharrell Williams discusses his Black Ambition initiative and the Juneteenth Pledge.

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Toby
programme.desc: Angela, sick of Michael's unreasonable demands, refuses to plan Toby's goodbye party, forcing him to turn to Phyllis for help. Meanwhile, Dwight and Meredith haze the new HR woman.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: A record company steals Chef's song 'Stinky Britches' and he sues them for the rights. When Johnny Cochrane defends the record company, Chef is left penniless. But he has some very famous and talented friends who want to help their old mentor.

programme.title: South Park: Worldwide Recorder Concert
programme.desc: The children of South Park are invited to Arkansas for the 'Four Million Child Blow 2000,' the first worldwide recorder concert. When Cartman discovers the 'brown noise,' he changes the music for the concert, causing a very smelly mess.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: Dec 14, 2020
programme.desc: President Trump gets a reality check, Desi Lydic and Roy Wood Jr. host a voter suppression game show, and Pharrell Williams discusses his Black Ambition initiative and the Juneteenth Pledge.

programme.title: South Park: Christian Rock Hard
programme.desc: When the other boys kick Cartman out of their band, he pulls his own group together to make music for Jesus.

programme.title: South Park: Super Fun Time
programme.desc: While the kids are on an educational field trip to a living museum, Cartman makes Butters sneak away from the class to go to the amusement center located next door.

programme.title: South Park: It's a Jersey Thing
programme.desc: Randy spearheads the town's defence when 'Jersey Shore'-inspired Garden State residents are threatening to take over the entire country.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park: A Scause for Applause
programme.desc: A serious doping scandal shakes everyone's faith in a beloved icon. Everyone who once supported the fallen hero is now cutting off their symbolic yellow wristbands.

programme.title: South Park: Over Logging
programme.desc: One day the citizens of South Park wake up and find the Internet is gone. When Randy hears there may still be some Internet out in California, he packs up his family and heads west.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sister Sister
programme.desc: When a dog trainer is found dead at home, her champion Rottweiler is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Fake It 'til You Make It
programme.desc: After a body turns up in Boston with links to another murder in Los Angeles, Jane and Maura pack up their sunscreen and hop on a plane. With the girls out of town, Angela and Korsak plan a double date with Kiki and Ron.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Designing Spaces: Smart Advice for Your Home and Finances
programme.desc: Stress-free cleaning both inside and outside; small personal loans; financial technology for seniors; empowering small businesses; smart thermostats.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Much Too Much
programme.desc: Meredith is mortified when her 'one night stand' shows up at the hospital in need of medical attention; a woman carrying quintuplets is overwhelmed by numerous medical issues as she navigates her high-risk pregnancy; Alex's shortcomings frustrate Izzie.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Owner of a Lonely Heart
programme.desc: Christina has little sympathy for a prison inmate who jeopardized her health to get out of solitary confinement; the interns keep careful watch on a family of premature quintuplets with a variety of serious health challenges; Izzy angers Alex.

programme.title: The Closer: Out of Focus
programme.desc: When a paparazzi photographer appears to have killed himself by jumping out of a hotel window, Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson is called in to investigate. Fritz is getting calls from a female colleague, which makes Brenda jealous.

programme.title: The Closer: Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Brenda starts an investigation when severed body parts are found in the dumpster. The victim is a popular porn star who also happens to have HIV+. Many of the co-stars may have also been exposed to HIV.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Return to Sender
programme.desc: The squad must work quickly to track down a serial killer before he strikes again. Meanwhile, things get dangerous over a game of chess.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Return to Sender
programme.desc: The unit draws closer to finding a dangerous serial killer. Rusty faces his biggest challenge yet when he takes the stand against Phillip Stroh. Meanwhile the team goes head to head with a touch attorney.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Flight Risk
programme.desc: When a father and his two young children go missing, the squad has to work quickly to find them, while uncovering a slew of terrible family secrets along the way. Meanwhile, Raydor does her best to trust Rusty.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: When Maura is abducted, nothing will stand in the way of Jane and the team bringing her home. Far away, Maura discovers a conspiracy that is bigger than just her kidnapping, with Jane as its ultimate target.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Bloodshed in the Barn
programme.desc: Not long after taking a new job, beloved horse-trainer Fiona Southwell is found brutally murdered in a rural stable, and a small seaside town in Northern England must find the killer.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Poisonous Affair
programme.desc: When cancer researcher Dr. George Blumenschein ends up admitted at his own hospital a toxic work environment may be to blame.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Deadly Ambition
programme.desc: A shooting at the University of Alabama Huntsville leaves three professors dead and the community questioning how they missed a murderer in their midst.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Death of the Socialite
programme.desc: When an Atlanta socialite is gunned down in her foyer, the search for her murderer leads investigators across the world.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Murder in the Mansion
programme.desc: An IT entrepreneur in Keller, Texas is killed in a deadly home invasion, but the evidence on the scene and his widow's account of the attack aren't adding up.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: BattleBots: Blood, Sweat and Gears
programme.desc: Former Giant Nut winner Tombstone takes on rookie Slap Box and the part-frog, part-killer robot Ribbot takes on the feline-inspired MadCatter. Giant walker-bot Chomp makes its debut and End Game takes on Bloodsport in a messy main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Sin City Slasher
programme.desc: Giant Nut runner-up Witch Doctor faces Kraken: both are winless and desperate for victory. Vegas newcomer Jackpot rolls the dice against veteran Ghost Raptor and flipper Hydra has an enormous surprise in store for HUGE.

programme.title: BattleBots: Battle of the Undefeated
programme.desc: Sparks fly round the BattleBox as Valkyrie and Rotator square off in a deadly battle of horizontal spinners. Undefeated Malice and MadCatter duke it out while Uppercut takes on SawBlaze in an explosive main event.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: Mo Money Mo Problems
programme.desc: Sixty-four of the fastest racers from all over the country arrive to compete in Mega Cash Days, the first double elimination race of its kind. With over $300,000 up for grabs throughout the event, everyone is ready to lay it all on the line for each win.

programme.title: BattleBots: Battle of the Undefeated
programme.desc: Sparks fly round the BattleBox as Valkyrie and Rotator square off in a deadly battle of horizontal spinners. Undefeated Malice and MadCatter duke it out while Uppercut takes on SawBlaze in an explosive main event.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: Mo Money Mo Problems
programme.desc: Sixty-four of the fastest racers from all over the country arrive to compete in Mega Cash Days, the first double elimination race of its kind. With over $300,000 up for grabs throughout the event, everyone is ready to lay it all on the line for each win.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Enter the Mammoth Claw
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is finally down to virgin ground but discovers their equipment is no match for the giant boulders at Rockfall Ravine, so Wes fabricates a new tool for their arsenal: The Mammoth Claw. Fred puts greenhorn Scott to the test.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Fistful of Nuggets
programme.desc: Dustin's gamble of investing his life savings into these claims pays off after Carlos removes a monster boulder and finds chunky nuggets. Fred and crew battle the Trifecta, and a game-changing discovery proves Fred's theory of the ancient waterfall.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Fistful of Nuggets
programme.desc: Dustin's gamble of investing his life savings into these claims pays off after Carlos removes a monster boulder and finds chunky nuggets. Fred and crew battle the Trifecta, and a game-changing discovery proves Fred's theory of the ancient waterfall.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Rookie Mistakes
programme.desc: On a gold streak, Dustin dives deeper than ever and uncovers the largest obstacle of his career. New recruit Scott finally gets the opportunity to prove himself in the water, but a rookie mistake could end his career just as it gets started.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Happy Endings
programme.desc: Dustin calls on local legend 'The Pirate' for help cracking a boulder blocking him from the richest ground of his life. After Fred is forced to put all diving on hold, Paul returns and they're on track to get gold for the first time this season.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Real Robin Hood
programme.desc: Josh criss-crosses the English countryside in search of the real Robin Hood.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Mexican City
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches Mexico for clues behind the mysterious rise and disappearance of Teotihuacan, a powerful civilization that predated the Aztecs in Mesoamerica.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the D.B. Cooper Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off on an expedition to crack the mystery behind the perpetrator of the only unsolved plane hijacking in US history.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Submerged Treasure
programme.desc: With an access tunnel to the underground cavern finally opened, and a tantalizing clue discovered, Duane's son Chad takes a risky dive into the flooded cave system, and what he finds defies all explanation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Big Red vs. Sluicifer
programme.desc: A competition erupts between Parker's two wash plant teams. Tony discovers a pile of lost gold. Fred Lewis' and veteran crew fire up The Colonel and face an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Rick's Sixth Sense
programme.desc: Rick risks his season on a hunch that he's discovered new hot spot. Tony mobilizes an arsenal to cash in on lost gold. Fred's veteran crew fight old equipment.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Lost Gold of Paradise Hill
programme.desc: Tony fires up a second plant to haul in gold left behind by the old-timers. Tensions rise when Parker departs for Alaska, leaving Mitch in charge. Rick faces disaster when he his sluice box springs a leak.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Couch Cushion/ Furry
programme.desc: Lauren can't go to a social event without wearing her fur suit. Adele has been eating couch cushions for twenty years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to Coffee Enemas/ Licks Cats
programme.desc: Trina and her husband, Mike, have done nearly 7,000 coffee enemas over the last two and a half years. Meanwhile, Lisa has been addicted to licking her cat and eating clumps of its hair for three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Bathes in Bleach/ Eats Plastic
programme.desc: Kailyn has eaten plastic every day for more than eleven years; Gloria has taken her addiction to bleach to the extreme by bathing in it daily.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Rampant Rats/ Extreme Fingernails
programme.desc: Theresa has more than 60 pet hairless rats that are taking over her tiny studio apartment. Meanwhile, 48-year old, Jazz has been growing her fingernails for 22 years. Her longest nail is two feet long, and she calls them her children.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Identical Twin Obsession/ Eats Mattresses
programme.desc: Forty-four year old twins Amy and Becky are addicted to being identical, looking alike, acting alike, and even weighing their meals to stay the exact same size. Meanwhile, Jennifer has been addicted to eating mattresses for over 20 years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Dirt/ Extreme Toenails
programme.desc: Kristie has eaten dirt every day for the last 30 years, consuming more than five tons since her addiction began. Meanwhile, Ayanna is addicted to growing her toenails.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The World's Largest Lump
programme.desc: Ronen's mysterious lump above his knee is one of the largest Dr. Lee has ever seen. Amber suffers from a debilitating skin disease that no one understands. Sandy has a neck lump she calls Tommy. Kristy's eyelid cyst is ruining her life.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: peh-DUN-kyoo-LAY-ted
programme.desc: Traci's confidence has been destroyed after years of bullying from the bumps that have plagued her face for 20 years. Ravon has a unique dangling growth on his leg.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Eggs Lipoma
programme.desc: David is back to see Dr. Lee after she spotted a suspicious growth under his eye. Nicole is depressed because of the bumps all over her neck. Steve has a noticeable lump on his forehead. Allen has a growth on his bicep but is terrified of doctors.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Last Unicorn
programme.desc: Louis is a veteran who is covered in scaly, dry skin that makes him feel like an alligator. Irais's kids are bullied because of the embarrassing growth on her head. Johnny's been living with a stubborn lump on his back for too long.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: An American Tail

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Smushed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr give a security presentation that’s anything but safe, then hold hands with strangers in the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Human Piñata
programme.desc: The guys hug it out with strangers in the park, go head-to-head pitching wacky inventions to confused consumers, and launch a manhunt for their imaginary wives.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Toasted
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q get in a pickle serving up humiliating tasks as deli waiters, and later, they step behind the counter asking customers to settle a series of silly debates. Plus, tonight's big loser gets burned during an embarrassing toast.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: A passersby reaction to Sal burying his niece in the park, the rare outcome of a Joker vs. Joker challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Invent a Dish Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe show off their artistic abilities as they dine, and get Mariano Rivera to judge their works. Plus, Q flips a doubloon to determine if there will be another season.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Mirror - Interns
programme.desc: The Interns meet some unsettling outsiders and learn just how deep the NSA Internship program goes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Invent a Dish Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe show off their artistic abilities as they dine, and get Mariano Rivera to judge their works. Plus, Q flips a doubloon to determine if there will be another season.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Mirror - Interns
programme.desc: The Interns meet some unsettling outsiders and learn just how deep the NSA Internship program goes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous when Aidan suggests that they move in together. To make matters worse, she finds an engagement ring among his things and questions whether he is 'the one.' Miranda and Steve decide to raise the baby together, while living separately.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Change of a Dress
programme.desc: When Carrie tells Aidan she wants to take things slower, he refuses to give her time and moves out of their apartment the following day. Meanwhile, the monogamy bug bites Samantha when she finds out Richard is sleeping with other women.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ring a Ding Ding
programme.desc: Carrie has a serious financial problem; Miranda and Steve grapple with raising a baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: A Vogue Idea
programme.desc: Carrie begins her new job at Vogue; Charlotte hosts Miranda's baby shower.

programme.title: Sex and the City: I Heart NY
programme.desc: Carrie becomes nostalgic about her relationship with Mr. Big and the city she loves.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lip Service
programme.desc: The media starts prying into Kylie's beauty secrets and she realizes that she must address her new look. Also, Scott hires Kourtney as an interior designer but when the lines between work and pleasure get blurred, he worries that he has made a mistake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Moon Over Montana
programme.desc: Kim tries to keep traditions alive by planning a family ski trip to Montana, but there's no mistaking that this year's vacation has different vibe. On the slopes, Khloé risks life and limb to bond with Kylie.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye ...
programme.desc: In the mid-season finale, the siblings return home from Montana to wish their dad well as Bruce prepares to transition. Kris travels with Kendall to Paris, and Kim pursues one last hope of getting pregnant.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Mother Armenia
programme.desc: Kim and Khloé visit the land of their ancestors to fulfill a long-standing dream of their father's. Kourtney wants to figure out why Kylie is being so distant and the truth is something unexpected.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: It Feels Good to be Home
programme.desc: Kanye says 'thank you' to Armenia by playing a surprise public concert there. Kim arranges a special stop in Jerusalem to have North baptized in Israel's oldest Armenian Church. Back in LA, everyone responds differently to having Caitlyn in their lives.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Vanity Unfair
programme.desc: When Caitlyn comes out in her first big magazine interview and says things the family considers hurtful, Kim does what she can to pick up the pieces. Meanwhile, Khloé must decide how much emotional support she can afford to give to Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Last Straw
programme.desc: Kourtney tries to keep it together as Scott's behavior spirals out of control, but when he's photographed in France with another woman, Kourtney is not sure how much more she can take. Khloé decides she must meet Caitlyn face to face.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Catch of the Day
programme.desc: A stolen truckload of lobsters throws a wrench into Sam's plan for an elite wedding.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Good Run of Bad Luck
programme.desc: Danny helps an ex-marine's wife out by caring for her baby while she's at an interview.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Games People Play
programme.desc: A stranger shows up with news that Nessa's father is alive and wants to see her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Montecito Lancers
programme.desc: Sam mentors Gavin Brunson's girlfriend until Sam discovers her plan to get him fired.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: 25 Ingredients or Less
programme.desc: Food Network's Giada De Laurentiis brings in pal Meredith Vieira to try to beat Bobby Flay in 25 ingredients or less. Chefs Marcos Campos and Nicholas Poulmetis try not to slip up on the star ingredient for a shot at taking down the king.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fey vs. Flay
programme.desc: Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli shows Bobby Flay no mercy with fellow mean girl, the hilarious and talented actress Tina Fey. They bring in two more mean girls, celebrity chef Alexcia Smith and former stuntwoman-turned-chef Asia Mei.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Just Act Natural
programme.desc: It will be a hardcore competition between veteran Indian chef Thomas John when he takes on personal chef Gail Arnold. Chef Bobby Flay has two excellent friends in the front row to watch, The Barefoot Contessa, Ina Garten, and Neil Patrick Harris.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Queen Is In
programme.desc: The queen of food, Martha Stewart, graces the kitchen along with her pal, Chef Richard Blais. They hold court with talented chefs Katherine Fuchs and Michael Merida to make Bobby Flay look like the court jester.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: The kitchen heats up when Brooklyn-born chef Jen Biesty takes on self-taught chef Chris Lamphier. Who will beat the heat when Chopped judge Alex Guarnaschelli and The Kitchen's Katie Lee turn up the pressure.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fry Me a River
programme.desc: Chopped judges Scott Conant and Geoffrey Zakarian have yet to take down the king. They return to the arena for redemption and to get the job done, they've brought in Nevada's Robert Hesse to battle New York's Michael Jenkins.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: All At Stake
programme.desc: Nostalgia is in the air as Chopped judge Amanda Freitag and The Chew's Carla Hall aim to put an end to Bobby Flay's golden era. They've called in butcher Charles Bauer and top Miami chef Todd Erickson to get the job done.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fit to Flay
programme.desc: "Chopped's" Scott Conant and actress Jane Seymour team up to make Bobby Flay sweat. They've recruited a couple of big-name chefs, New York City's Nate Appleman and Italy's own Silvia Barban, to beat Flay to the finish line.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Forecasting a Win
programme.desc: America's favorite weatherman, Al Roker, joins Food Network's Katie Lee to bring a torrential downpour on Bobby Flay's day. Chefs Maris Grubb and Justin Walker will be cooking up a storm to try to rain on Bobby's parade.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It's All Gouda
programme.desc: Emotions run high as Anne Burrell and Michael Voltaggio bring in two young chefs to challenge Bobby Flay. The two up-and-comers, Dafna Mizrahi and Jose DeJesus, specialize in Mexican cuisine, and they're not going to play nice.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Get In the Zone
programme.desc: Chopped's Alex Guarnaschelli and sports anchor Kenny Mayne have analyzed, scrutinized and teamed up to score one over Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Marital Match
programme.desc: Husband and wife Cody and Sam Carroll of Cajun Aces compete to prove that love is a kitchen battlefield. It's only fitting that The Kitchen's dynamic duo, Sunny Anderson and Jeff Mauro, officiate the attempt to send Bobby Flay off unhappily ever after.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: All in the Family
programme.desc: Sassy Miami chef Mika Leon brings the heat against Atlanta chef Michael Bertozzi. Chef Carla Hall and actor Jesse Tyler Ferguson decide who has what it takes to join their modern family for a food fight against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: BBF vs. Chopped
programme.desc: Chop chop Mr. Flay! Food Network's Ted Allen is turning the tables in Bobby Flay's kitchen and he's got the Chopped dream team to back him up.

programme.title: Bobby and Giada in Italy: When in Rome
programme.desc: Bobby Flay and Giada De Laurentiis arrive in Rome and immediately seek out their favorite foods, pizza and gelato. They visit the neighborhoods they love, learn about four iconic pastas and sit down to a traditional Roman meal with Giada's mom.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold: In the Red

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bedrock Gold

programme.title: Gold Rush: Man Down
programme.desc: A heart attack has 91-year-old mining legend, John Schnabel, battling for his life; the Hoffmans find a gold nugget that becomes a game changer and Dakota Fred does finally hits bedrock at Porcupine Creek.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Twenty Four Seven
programme.desc: Short on time, the Hoffman crew decides to run night and day in a struggle to get to the gold. Meanwhile a federal mining inspector pays a surprise visit to both Fred and Parker and finds safety violations and both operations face closure.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: The Hoffman crew is dead in the water until Harness can repair their broken excavator. Parker Schnabel totals his gold for the season and hands the Big Nugget mine back to his grandpa. The Dakota boys lock horns trying to re-open their mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bedrock Gold
programme.desc: After their first dig site is exhausted, the Hoffman crew races to open a new cut, but not before a key member of the team quits. Massive rocks break Dakota Fred's derocker and Parker Schnabel reconsiders his future.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Man Down
programme.desc: A heart attack has 91-year-old mining legend, John Schnabel, battling for his life; the Hoffmans find a gold nugget that becomes a game changer and Dakota Fred does finally hits bedrock at Porcupine Creek.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold: Ruby Fever
programme.desc: Sixty Degree Resources, a small American mining company, returned to Greenland for another battle with the beast.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold: The Belly of the Red Beast
programme.desc: The American miners have their sights set on what team geologist Eric Drummond believes could be the largest ruby deposit in the Arctic. But Greenland's wild frontier soon plays havoc as the team struggles to return to its prized claim from last year.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Vacation Nightmare
programme.desc: Hiking in the Montana mountains, trail engineer Todd Orr is attacked twice by grizzly bear protecting her cubs. And, during a vacation in the Bahamas, Tiffany Johnson is snorkeling when she finds herself face to face with a tiger shark.

programme.title: I Was Prey: 20-Foot Terror
programme.desc: Micki Glenn is attacked by a shark during a dive trip. Hours from the nearest medical facility, she has to rely on her husband and friends to save her life. And, a couple celebrating their wedding anniversary are attacked by a giraffe while on safari.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Unseen Assailant
programme.desc: Paul is leading a canoe safari near Victoria Falls when a hippo bursts to the surface and drags him into the water. In Texas, five-year-old Jade DeMoss is outside, looking for her mother, when an animal pounces on her and attacks.

programme.title: River Monsters: Jungle Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to discover the true river monster of South America.

programme.title: River Monsters: Cold Blooded Horror
programme.desc: The River Monsters in Japan are like no others Jeremy has ever encountered, from the devastating earthquake-causing catfish, the Namazu, to the sinister, child-snatching killer called the Kappa.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Flesh Eaters
programme.desc: Wade seeks the notorious flesh eaters of the Amazon, including a fish that can swallow a man whole.

programme.title: River Monsters: Alligator Gar

programme.title: River Monsters: Rift Valley Killers
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Africa's Rift Valley to explore the roots of fishing and the monsters the first fishermen faced; it's a dangerous place filled with killer crocs, hippos and warring gangs, but at its heart is a worthy prize: the Nile perch.

programme.title: River Monsters: Silent Assassin

programme.title: River Monsters: Malaysian Lake Monster

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Dark and Dingy

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Infringing Flip

programme.title: Flip or Flop: What's Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Hacienda Heights, California, where they find some outdated designs and others that are in-style once again.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take a gamble on a tri-level house in Irvine, CA, buying it sight unseen. The neighborhood is hot, but the house needs a lot of work.

programme.desc: When a devastating sinkhole tears through a family's property in New Jersey, engineers use the latest cutting-edge tech in a race to fix the devastating damage and prevent more sinkholes.

programme.desc: When a sinkhole suddenly forms beneath a Florida resort, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Crash Test World: Feed the World
programme.desc: How will the growing world be fed? Kari meets with business owners and community leaders in San Francisco and Detroit to learn about alternative and sustainable proteins and the importance that honey bees have on the environment.

programme.title: Crash Test World: Israel
programme.desc: Kari visits communities across Israel and discovers that there are many ways to achieve peaceful coexistence: whether through curiosity of technology, sharing food and cuisine or enjoying sporting activities together.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Underwater Godzilla
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster; using cutting-edge tech, investigators hunt for this beast of the deep.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Lost Highway
programme.desc: In 1996, in Tulsa, Oklahoma, a young mother is found dead on the side of a rural stretch of highway in an apparent hit-and-run accident. But as the family grieves, the façade begins to crack, and soon the truth seeps out.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: We Found Bonnie
programme.desc: In 1993, a family is torn apart when a mother in Jacksonville, Florida goes missing. The case stumps detectives, who believe that the truth about what happened to her is locked inside the mind of the missing woman's three-year-old son.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Truth, Lies and Redemption
programme.desc: In 1988, a man is released from jail after a judge deems his murder confession false. For 25 years, a family's hope for justice fades, as the killer walks the streets. One tenacious detective refuses to let this cold case go.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Path
programme.desc: In 1997, in quaint Anne Arundel County, Maryland, a detective inherits a stack of cold cases. As he begins to unravel each one, he uncovers a shocking and gruesome common thread.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Put on a Happy Face
programme.desc: Melissa Moore loved being daddy's little girl, and thought her father, Keith Jesperson, could do no wrong. As she got older, that admiration was replaced by fear, and then by the horror of learning how close she had come to being his next victim.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A cold-blooded murder of a 39-year-old woman sends detectives in Oldsmar, Florida on the hunt for a killer, and their only clues are three letters written in blood and a pizza delivery.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Boxes and Bloodshed
programme.desc: A hospital worker invites a colleague (who's fallen on hard times) to come live with her. But the good deed backfires, and it only takes a few weeks before a stealthy betrayal turns into a gruesome crime.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Roadkill
programme.desc: A single mother and her daughter are delighted when a single dad and his two daughters move in next door. They become fast friends until molestation charges send their relationship spiralling into anger, accusation, and eventually multiple bloody deaths.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A cold-blooded murder of a 39-year-old woman sends detectives in Oldsmar, Florida on the hunt for a killer, and their only clues are three letters written in blood and a pizza delivery.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Boxes and Bloodshed
programme.desc: A hospital worker invites a colleague (who's fallen on hard times) to come live with her. But the good deed backfires, and it only takes a few weeks before a stealthy betrayal turns into a gruesome crime.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Houseknives
programme.desc: Two families with several children between them get along famously until one of the mothers starts to dictate to the other how she should be raising her kids. Battle lines are drawn, violence flares, and blood runs in the street.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Last Blanco
programme.desc: Michael Blanco never doubted the violent things his mother did were to keep their family safe until one day he learned the truth.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: The Doctor and the Beauty Queen
programme.desc: Rich doctor and devoted Mormon, Martin MacNeill begins a torrid affair with fiery vixen, Gypsy Willis while his wife Michele tends to their children. But when Michele finds out and demands Martin end the affair, someone is bound to get burned.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Manhattan Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Barbara Kogan is spending her fortune while her husband George scrambles to dig them out of debt by way of his mafia connections. Making matters worse, Barbara hires a hot, young publicist. It's the final straw for their marriage... and their lives.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: Sin City Secrets
programme.desc: Tina Gardner thinks she's destined for greatness. She meets Andre who asks her to help him launch a new business venture and they take Las Vegas by storm. The pressure leads to accusations of cheating and abuse with Andre on the losing end of a knife.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: Mama's Little Princess
programme.desc: Nicole Taylor is a spoiled princess never learned how to be independent. Spending a lifetime abusing drugs and chasing bad boys, she falls head over heels for Freddie. Her obsession with Freddie turns a lover's quarrel into a violent ending.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: Dangerous Devotion
programme.desc: Jameelah is studying her way out of urban Baltimore. She falls for James, a drug dealer. Incarceration can't separate them, and they get married. When reunited the relationship becomes volatile and erupts, Jameelah stabs James five times in a fit of rage.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: From Diamonds to Death
programme.desc: Ann McDonald's wealthy husband Rich cares more about social status than her happiness. When she seeks solace in Al Braunberger's arms, it unleashes a side of Rich she's never seen and a side of Al she never expected, trapping her in a deadly game.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: The Appointment
programme.desc: Jennifer Snyder is a shy vet tech who falls for her boss, a driven young doctor. Overshadowing their steamy affair is a controlling wife and a surprise pregnancy announcement which sets in motion a cold blooded murder plot.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: The Imposter
programme.desc: Barbie Dailey goes looking for love on-line and meets Josh, who appears to be the answer to her prayers. When her friends uncover a dark secret, their fairy-tale romance is consumed by obsession, jealousy and a killer rage.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Red Wedding
programme.desc: A chance encounter on a NY subway brings hard-working immigrant Gladys Ricart love, and introduces her to a lush world she'd never imagined. But her plans for a dream wedding turn into a devastating nightmare.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: A Dangerous Mind
programme.desc: When maternal senior psychiatric nurse Maria Jordan fires erratic, heroin-addicted junior nurse Denis Czajkowski, it triggers an all-consuming obsession with Maria that culminates in him holding her hostage for an unimaginably bloody 48 hours.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Just a Wall Away
programme.desc: When writer Amy Neisis finds her dream apartment everything is set for a bright future. It's within her budget and she moves quickly to secure a sale. But four nights after moving a terrifying scream makes her realise she got more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Devil in the Pews
programme.desc: While 18-year-old Jennifer is recovering from a brain tumor, she's visited by a member of her congregation, reformed ex-con Bill. But her gratitude soon turns to fear as it becomes obvious Bill wants to keep Jennifer as his own -- forever.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Waco Standoff: As We Watched
programme.desc: On April 19, 1993, FBI agents attacked a religious compound in Waco, Texas, occupied by a small obscure religious cult. 76 people, including 26 children, died. The repercussions of Waco are still being felt.

programme.title: Unabomber: 20 Years of Terror
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs but when his brother David realized who was the Unabomber, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.title: Manson: The Prison Tapes
programme.desc: Relive the horrific Tate and LaBianca murders, and the media circus surrounding the trials of cult leader Charles Manson and his 'family' of misfit killers.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Unabomber: 20 Years of Terror

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: No Longer Grandma's House
programme.desc: After inheriting his family's Cape Cod cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, a man realizes it looks like grandma still lives in the home. Marnie plans to bring the house up to date by ripping out the old wood paneling and more.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Pie-shaped Problem House
programme.desc: A couple loves to host family at their home in Dewey Beach, DE, but no one wants to stay in their tiny, awkwardly shaped guest house. With a limited budget, Marnie gets creative and bold with her design choices to transform the house.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Back to the Beach on the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach house in Ventnor City, New Jersey, where they can make memories with their daughter on the Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Backyard Beachside Blowout in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: After years of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina, with their three kids, Matt and Megann are ready to buy a weekend getaway home at the beach. After finding a fixer-upper in their budget, they have $50,000 to create a luxurious outdoor space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Getting Set in Narragansett, Rhode Island
programme.desc: After renting vacation homes in Narragansett, Rhode Island, for many years, a couple finally buys a place of their own that needs a lot of work. Luckily he is a general contractor and ready to take on the challenge.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Destined for a Renovation in Destin, Florida
programme.desc: Carrie and Lee have been splitting their time between Nashville and Destin, Florida but they want to get their two sons out of the city and into the sunshine - permanently.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Carb Overload
programme.desc: Carb lovers around the world rejoice as Eddie Jackson gears up for generous spreads and carb-on-carb dishes guaranteed to make the mouth water and the jaw drop.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Nutty for Nuts
programme.desc: Today is going to be a little nut! Hazelnuts can sweeten a savory dish, peanuts can bring a bit of saltiness to a dessert, and pistachios can add a crunchy texture.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Serious Spice
programme.desc: Good food is the spice of life, and we're adding a little kick with our flavor-filled favourites.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hamburger Heaven
programme.desc: It's burger time, and your favourite food personalities are pointing you in the right direction.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Small Plates, Big Taste
programme.desc: Chef Beau MacMillan dives into scallops; Roger Mooking travels to Texas for succulent chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Fez
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Fez, the cultural and spiritual capital of Morocco.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chesapeake Bay
programme.desc: Andrew tastes his way through the Chesapeake Bay area, trying creamy peanut soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: North Carolina's Triangle

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Ozarks

programme.desc: Sophia meets a fight manager and buys a controlling interest in boxer 'Kid Pepe.'

programme.title: Movie: Love in Design
programme.desc: A home-makeover star is sent to her hometown to renovate a historic manor. An old flame is assigned to ensure her work preserves the history of the building and the two are forced to work closely together.

programme.title: Movie: Falling for You
programme.desc: A local radio host is hosting a bachelor bake-off to raise money to save the station. She immediately finds chemistry with one of the bachelors and they find it challenging to work together as their attraction grows.

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Autumn
programme.desc: A woman divides up her candy shop between her niece, and a maple farmer. Neither know her true intentions until they attend the Sweet Autumn Festival in town.

programme.title: Movie: The Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: A small-town baker is surprised with an invite to compete in a baking show. While there, she runs into her ex-fiancé.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A documentary-style look at the daily lives of office workers at a mid-sized paper company.

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Toby
programme.desc: Angela, sick of Michael's unreasonable demands, refuses to plan Toby's goodbye party, forcing him to turn to Phyllis for help. Meanwhile, Dwight and Meredith haze the new HR woman.

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.title: The Office: Business Ethics
programme.desc: A business ethics seminar gets out of control when Michael lets everyone speak freely about his or her unethical behaviour at work. Meanwhile, Jim makes Dwight comply with the company's 'time theft' policy.

programme.title: The Office: Baby Shower
programme.desc: Michael practices for the birth of Jan's baby by having Dwight go over possible birthing scenarios. Meanwhile, Michael tells Holly that he will pretend to dislike her for Jan's benefit.

programme.title: The Office: Crime Aid
programme.desc: Michael helps Pam get a part time job at corporate so she can afford to go to art school. After the office gets robbed, Michael decides to hold an auction to raise money for all the items lost.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Rebound
programme.desc: Johnny becomes overly involved in Alexis's romantic life, while Moira offends the townspeople in an interview with 'People' magazine.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Sunrise, Sunset
programme.desc: Moira's former 'Sunrise Bay' producers show up with big news, while Alexis binge-watches old episodes of the soap.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: The Roses attend the Escape Room portion of David and Patrick's Bachelor Party, but their participation wanes the more their personal dilemmas come to a head.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Pitch
programme.desc: Johnny, Stevie and Roland head to New York for their pitch meeting, while the family anxiously awaits their return.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Start Spreading the News
programme.desc: Moira receives some unexpected news and David makes a tough decision about where he wants to live.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Happy Ending
programme.desc: As David stresses out over the rain on his wedding day, the family scrambles to make it right.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan: Noble Ape
programme.desc: Jim Gaffigan takes you on a tour of everything that crosses his mind, including fruit-shaped tumors, the brilliance of Japanese toilets and, of course, food, lots of food.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Something Wall-Mart This Way Comes
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park: D-Yikes!
programme.desc: Once again Mrs. Garrison gets dumped. But this time she takes it out on the class. When the bar Mrs. Garrison finds solace in is about to be taken over by Persian club owners, she fights to save the one place that lets her be the woman she is.

programme.title: South Park: You Have 0 Friends
programme.desc: When Kyle begs Stan to 'friend' him, Stan gets sucked into the world of Facebook. Kyle gets a hard lesson about the politics of Facebook when he friends the least popular kid in school.

programme.title: South Park: Gluten Free Ebola
programme.desc: South Park goes gluten free.

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef
programme.desc: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well. Meanwhile, Terrance and Phillip are disgusted by their new co-stars' antics.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland
programme.desc: When the entire contents of the world's imagination lay open before them, Stan and Kyle step right in. Back in South Park, Cartman swears he's seen a leprechaun.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode II
programme.desc: After the wall in Imaginationland is blown up by terrorists, the evil side crosses over. Cartman tracks down Kyle and Stan at the Pentagon and demands Kyle makes good on their agreement. Meanwhile, U.S. troops cross over into Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode III
programme.desc: Inside Imaginationland, Stan and Butters engage in the battle of their lives as they fight the army of evil imaginary forces. Meanwhile, Cartman goes all the way to the Supreme Court to get Kyle to pay up on their bet.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Operation Ann
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Leslie decides she needs to find Ann a new man. Ben must enlist Ron's help when he is stumped by Leslie's elaborate Valentine's Day scavenger hunt.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Dave Returns
programme.desc: While trying to get an endorsement from the chief of police, Leslie and Ben run into Leslie's old flame, Dave.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Leslie realizes the department has forgotten Jerry's birthday and decides to throw him a party.

programme.title: The Office: Employee Transfer
programme.desc: Pam is embarrassed when she is the only person at the corporate office wearing a costume on Halloween. Holly and Michael take the long trip to Nashua after they get some shocking news. Meanwhile, Dwight torments Andy and tries to get under his skin.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Survey
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim are shocked when they get the results of the annual customer survey report. Pam and Jim decide they want to spend every minute together using their Bluetooth phones. Meanwhile Angela and Andy pick a location for their wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Business Trip
programme.desc: Michael is ecstatic when David Wallace decides to send him on a business trip to Canada. Andy and Oscar become unlikely friends when Michael decides to bring them along. Meanwhile Jim counts down the days until Pam gets back from art school.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: The Office: The Surplus
programme.desc: Oscar informs Michael that the office must spend a $4300 surplus or lose it in next year's budget. When Michael opens up the floor for suggestions, factions break out and officemates square off against one another to get what they want.

programme.title: The Office: The Duel
programme.desc: The office is on eggshells because Andy still hasn't found out about Angela's affair with Dwight. When Michael spills the beans, Dwight and Andy take matters into their own hands. Meanwhile, Michael is nervous about his meeting with Wallace.

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question 'Is Hilary Swank hot?'

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael goes on a speaking tour of the other branches to explain Scranton's relative success. New party planners Dwight and Jim forget a birthday, with severe consequences.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael and Pam continue their tour of the branches with Michael taking a lesson from their visit to Utica. Dwight and Jim struggle to fulfill their new party planning duties with a grumpy staff. Meanwhile, Angela's new cat causes a stir.

programme.title: The Office: Blood Drive
programme.desc: Michael meets a mysterious woman at a Valentine's blood drive. Dwight and Kevin pair up with single women at the office 'Lonely Hearts Party.' Meanwhile, Jim and Pam are banished from the office for being too publicly affectionate.

programme.title: The Office: Golden Ticket
programme.desc: Michael causes a huge problem in the office when he comes up with the idea to put 'golden tickets' into the paper packages for clients to redeem. Andy, Jim and Pam give Kevin different advice on wooing a woman.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Murderjuana
programme.desc: A security guard foils a robbery when he kills one of the robbers, despite being wounded himself. Jane and Maura work together to solve the case after the search for the robber's accomplice raises some puzzling questions.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Scared to Death
programme.desc: A woman is found murdered in a grisly scene reminiscent of a horror movie, leading the team to uncover a frightening 'game' in which people pay to experience terror.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: East Meets West
programme.desc: When a gun battle rages in a quiet neighborhood, leaving one dead, Jane and Maura are thrown into the secretive world of an Eastern European gang. Maura tries home-remedies for a fever that have a surprising effect.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bomb Voyage
programme.desc: The clock is ticking as the team works to solve a murder with explosive consequences. Angela balks when Ron offers to take her on a romantic getaway.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: When a State Trooper is killed in Maine, the getaway car is traced back to the mastermind of the attacks on Jane.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Two Shots: Move Forward

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Dangerous Curve Ahead
programme.desc: While the entire Boston Police Department searches for Alice Sands, the team investigates a car crash that isn't all it seems. In the midst of all of this, a new romance blossoms.
