programme.title: Movie: Tempted by Danger
programme.desc: A woman sets up her successful but work obsessed sister up with a promising new hire in the hopes of balancing her life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues, threats of violence and most famously, ciphers that were supposed to lead police to his identity, but mostly went nowhere.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Back to Alaska
programme.desc: Parker returns to Alaska to prospect new ground and expand his empire. Rick digs deep for big gold in a cut he hopes will deliver the biggest weigh in of the season. Fred's crew member Johnny comes up with unique fix to their water problem.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Record Breaker
programme.desc: Parker returns to the Klondike and records the biggest gold haul of his career. Tony travels deep into the wilderness to resurrect of a gold-catching monster. Rick's forced to find better ground. Fred makes a big change to get on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Frenemies
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus content: Parker makes a deal with Tony to open a new cut on the Indian River and Tony's new trommel build gets derailed. Later, Fred's greenhorns step up to keep the Colonel running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Resurrecting Monsters
programme.desc: Parker cleans out the gold-rich Promiseland and risks losing Sluicifer during a move to new ground. The Beets try to supercharge their season with Tony's massive new trommel. Rick turns back to Monster Red in hopes of a record season.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: Mormon Gold
programme.desc: Duane decides that the flooded cave is too dangerous to dive into again, forcing the team to explore new access points to the underground cavern system. But something lurking in the darkness forces everyone to reevaluate their safety.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts No Glory
programme.desc: Todd, Jack and their crew of unemployed mining greenhorns leave their homes in Oregon with hopes of striking gold and saving their families in southeast Alaska.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Resurrecting Monsters
programme.desc: Parker cleans out the gold-rich Promiseland and risks losing Sluicifer during a move to new ground. The Beets try to supercharge their season with Tony's massive new trommel. Rick turns back to Monster Red in hopes of a record season.

programme.desc: Duane decides that the flooded cave is too dangerous to dive into again, forcing the team to explore new access points to the underground cavern system. But something lurking in the darkness forces everyone to reevaluate their safety.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts No Glory

programme.title: Expedition X: America's Lake Monster
programme.desc: When Josh Gates receives new, potential video proof of a giant creature living in Lake Champlain, he sends Phil and Jess to investigate the 30-foot serpent that's been spotted in the lake for generations. A dangerous dive uncovers new evidence.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Game of Bones and Unknowns
programme.desc: Josh explores the beauty of the spiritual realm. He investigates a German basilica said to house the bones of 11,000 virgins, a Japanese ice cave guarded by a dragon's spirit and a remote island where cats outnumber humans.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: Martin Family Redfish Team Challenge
programme.desc: Bragging rights are on the line.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Traffic Stop, Tunnel Terror
programme.desc: Firefighters survive a massive explosion, warheads explode in a Korean tunnel, an avalanche buries a city in Norway, a 100-foot crane collapse narrowly misses workers, and a racecar snaps in half at 310 miles per hour.

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Floating the Greenbrier
programme.desc: Curtis has waited for the 17-year Brood X Cicada Hatch.

programme.title: Addictive Fishing: Marco Slam
programme.desc: Blair fishes the backcountry waters of Marco Island for trout, redfish, snook and tarpon.

programme.title: The Next Bite: Classic Techniques: Three Ways for Mississippi River Walleyes
programme.desc: A look at the timeframe for walleyes on the Mississippi.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Only the Fastest
programme.desc: Street Outlaws history is made when 32 drivers compete for over $50,000 in the first-ever Cash Days in Oklahoma City. With a pot this big, tensions are running higher than ever and only the fastest of the fast will survive.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: The Depth of Red
programme.desc: Justin shares why he never gets tired of chasing redfish.

programme.title: BattleBots: Blood, Sweat and Gears
programme.desc: Former Giant Nut winner Tombstone takes on rookie Slap Box and the part-frog, part-killer robot Ribbot takes on the feline-inspired MadCatter. Giant walker-bot Chomp makes its debut and End Game takes on Bloodsport in a messy main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Battle of the Undefeated
programme.desc: Sparks fly round the BattleBox as Valkyrie and Rotator square off in a deadly battle of horizontal spinners. Undefeated Malice and MadCatter duke it out while Uppercut takes on SawBlaze in an explosive main event.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Rum Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as legal and outlaw distillers compete to make the best rum. Constructing stills of their own design and mashing in their own raw ingredients, only one will survive elimination to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Tim and his help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery in hopes of turning it from problem to profit. Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mark vs. Digger vs. Tim
programme.desc: Tickle hosts as Appalachia's most notorious moonshiners go head-to-head in a moonshine distilling competition. Mark, Digger and Tim run their own secret recipes to be judged by the public to determine once and for all who makes the best shine.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Angel's Story
programme.desc: At 42 years old, Angel is staring death in the face. She is struggling to make a positive change and be an active part of her partner and son's lives.

programme.title: 900 Pound Man: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: At 900 lbs., Ricky is one of the world's largest men. Follow Ricky over three years as he struggles to find a surgeon willing to take on his case and a way off the island of Guam to get the potentially lifesaving surgery he desperately needs.

programme.title: The 685-lb Teen
programme.desc: Justin Williamson is a teenager who weighs 670 lbs and is chasing his musical dreams while fighting for his life. Faced with death or surgery, Justin must transform.

programme.title: Unpolished: A New Beginning
programme.desc: A devastating loss hits the Martone family at its core as sisters Lexi and Bria and their mother Jennifer work together to reopen the salon after being closed due to the pandemic.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: More to Love: The Real You
programme.desc: Natalie doesn't want to unpack into Mike's smelly closet. Yara learns more about Jovi. Amira's dad confronts Andrew. Zied arrives in the U.S to questions from Rebecca's family. Hazel meets Tarik's daughter. Stephanie & Ryan get into a fight.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: First Look: You So Bad Boy
programme.desc: A wild night gets Brandon and Julia into trouble. Zied's first night doesn't go as planned. Mike feels insulted by Natalie. Yara worries she might be pregnant. Amira is released from custody. Hazel finds out Tarik has been texting their ex.

programme.desc: Ross looks after his newborn son and freaks when somebody drinks the breast milk.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Finds Out

programme.title: Friends: The One With Russ

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Lesbian Wedding

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Good Vanilla
programme.desc: For Ina Garten, good vanilla extract makes all the difference. That's why she makes her own extract and then uses it in a showstopping vanilla rum panna cotta with salted caramel.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Tipsy Desserts
programme.desc: Dessert is good, but for Ina Garten, tipsy desserts are even better. She uses sparkling white wine to add a little zing to moscato poached fruit that can be made in advance.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Money-Saving Madness
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts compete to make flavor-packed dishes that don't break the bank, like Geoffrey Zakarian's bucatini al limone and Sunny Anderson's red beans and rice with sausage. Blogger Deb Perelman stops by to make her bake sale winning-est bars.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Taste Of Capri Party
programme.desc: After a recent trip to Capri, Italy, Giada De Laurentiis hosts a lunch party for her girlfriends that celebrates the island and one of its most inspiring ingredients; the lemon.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: TV Dinner
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts her friends for an evening of cozy television-viewing, and she makes a hearty menu of small bites that are easy to eat in front of the TV. Giada provides blankets, pillows and an individual TV tray for each guest.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Underappreciated
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shines a spotlight on unsung hero ingredients. Canned foods reveal hidden talents in her Salmon burgers and spam fried rice. Then Ree uses a freezer star in a spinach mushroom quiche, and a baking mix takes the lead in chocolate chip scones.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Oh Boy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking for her permanently hungry teenage sons. First, she makes buffalo chicken totchos that are a blend of potato tots, nachos and wings.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Step Up the Savings
programme.desc: The Kitchen is stepping up the savings to make flavorful meals on a budget, starting with cheat sheet chorizo panzanella. There's also spaghetti with clams, slow-cooked adobo chicken and fancy-yet-frugal English pea and sweet onion risotto.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: The Cheap Cuts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his chef friends are all about making dishes with the cheap cuts. Aarti Sequeira makes mangalore buns, Michael Voltaggio steams mussels escabeche, Justin Warner cooks tacos con lengua, and Jonathan Waxman beer-braises a lamb shoulder.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri believes you don't need to break the bank to make delicious food, so he's invited his chef friends to the ranch to cook a frugal meal that's full of flavor. Aarti Sequeira makes a budget-friendly rice and lentil dish called Kichidi.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Good Day for a Win
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Mikey Day teams up with Katie Lee, which means double trouble for Bobby Flay as they try to distract him into losing. Asian whiz Minnie Nguyen and Southern expert Adam Hodgson both have one goal: secure a win against Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: All Dried Out Over You
programme.desc: Chef Anne Burrell and actor and cookbook author David Burtka dig deep for two powerful chefs that can take down Bobby Flay. Australian chef Rachael Polhill and Chef Ian Redshaw from Charlottesville, Va., are here to ensure victory is served.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Chopped's Alex Guarnaschelli and Geoffrey Zakarian have brought in two talented pastry chefs, Erica Land and Jacqueline Joy Dino, to sprinkle the kitchen with sugar and spice and a loss for Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Feather in Your Cap
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson and Alex Guarnaschelli watch as Mohan Ismail adds some Singaporean flare to his dish against Nicole Roarke from Long Island who has her flare to add. It's all in an effort to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Surf's Up
programme.desc: Philly's finest, Paras Shah, and Hawaiian chef Sheldon Simeon are brought in to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Humble Beginnings
programme.desc: Musician and Chef Eugene Jones and up-and-coming chef Christopher Wall enter a culinary skirmish for the chance to take down the legend, Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lies My Father Told Me

programme.desc: When Roseanne accepts delivery of too many new stoves for her diner, young D.J., who has found religion, begins spouting words of conscience and surprises Roseanne with some serious ethical questions.

programme.title: Roseanne: Body by Jake
programme.desc: When Bev breaks her pelvis in the retirement home, Roseanne and Dan are shocked to find out how it happened. As a result, Bev is forced to move in with them rather than die of embarrassment in the retirement community.

programme.title: Roseanne: Isn't It Romantic?
programme.desc: While Fred seeks advice on how to propose marriage to Jackie, Dan and Roseanne are rekindling their romance with inspiration from the soap opera 'One Life to Live'.

programme.title: Roseanne: Altar Egos
programme.desc: When they have a titanic ego clash, Roseanne is worried about the future of Fred and Jackie's relationship. It seems they just can't make up their minds, or egos, about walking down the aisle together.

programme.title: Roseanne: Nine Is Enough
programme.desc: Roseanne's announcement that she is pregnant again leads to her and Dan debating kicking Becky out of the house to make room. Jackie and Fred squabble over sleeping arrangements.

programme.title: Roseanne: Two for One
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan suffer from pregnancy jitters. Meanwhile, Roseanne accidentally uncovers Darlene's dark secret - she's having an affair.

programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy hopes to reel in a rare river monster that's become legendary.

programme.title: River Monsters: Vampires of the Deep

programme.title: River Monsters: Bone Crusher
programme.desc: Jeremy is on the trail of a new river monster after a corpse is found with highly unusual injuries. He also uncovers a spate of disappearances and a mysterious creature patrolling the water.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Turtle Comeback
programme.desc: A charismatic ostrich named Olga works to be reunited with her flock. Buster the squirrel monkey is introduced to the zoo's troop of feisty females. A functionally extinct species of turtle finds new life, and everyone's favorite warthog is back.

programme.title: The Zoo: New Chick on the Block
programme.desc: A popular sea lion falls ill after ingesting a foreign object. The avian team devises a plan to increase the cock-of-the-rocks population. Endangered snakes are coupled for breeding, and Andean bear cubs meet their fans.

programme.title: The Zoo: Beloved Bugs
programme.desc: The zoo anxiously awaits the arrival of a snow leopard called K2's fourth cub. The staff is pleased when a pair of Andean condors embrace their new enclosure, while a squirmy binturong fights his annual vaccination.

programme.title: The Zoo: Fawns Become Friends
programme.desc: Two sickly newborn fawns form an unbreakable bond while they are hand-reared by staff. Leopard Khazo gets a surprise that enhances her life, and tensions run high as the reptile staff attempts to collect blood from Cuban crocs.

programme.title: The Zoo: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Max the camel faces new challenges as he ages. The zoo prepares to give an injured turkey vulture a permanent home, but after healing, there may be a change of plan. Willow the red panda gives birth to two baby cubs.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wild Dogs on the Move
programme.desc: A trio of rare Dhole canines are prepared to make their cross-country journey to the zoo, and keepers anxiously await their arrival. A tinamou chick must be hand-reared, while a specialized tool is welded to extract a tusk from a charming Babirusa.

programme.desc: Ally is under a tight deadline to finish writing new songs for her demo reel, so Austin tries to write his own song, instead of relying on Ally.

programme.title: Jessie: Ride to Riches
programme.desc: Jessie is determined to get to an important audition, but she and Ravi end up on the 'Rides to Riches' game show where contestants can win prizes during their taxi ride.

programme.title: Jessie: Between the Swoon and New York City
programme.desc: Jessie hits it off with a new guy she meets in the park unaware that he is Ms. Chesterfield's son.

programme.title: Jessie: No Money, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Mrs. Chesterfield has cut off Brooks financially, so Tony and Jessie get Brooks a job as an elevator attendant. Mrs. Chesterfield is appalled and has Betram go on a mission to get dirt on Jessie than can lead to her and Brooks' breakup.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Greens' Acres/ Dolled Up
programme.desc: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to keep the family farm in business. When Tilly and Nancy celebrate Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store, they set their sights on a seat next to Cantaloupe Sinclair, the tea party's posh VIP.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gabriella's Fella/ Cheap Show
programme.desc: When Cricket's crush returns, Remy takes the opportunity to help Cricket get to know her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Mirror/ Cricket's Tickets
programme.desc: When the Greens visit BigTech, Tilly jumps at the chance to test Gwendolyn Zapp's new technology, which promises to make them the "perfect family." Cricket wins tickets to a show and must decide whether to bring Tilly or Remy.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Times Circle/ Super Gramma
programme.desc: Tilly and Remy put on a sidewalk play while Cricket and Bill meet their favorite costumed superheroes. Cricket and Tilly try to keep Gramma at home while she recovers from eye surgery.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Present Tense/ Hurt Bike
programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Quiet Please/ Chipwrecked
programme.desc: When the Greens visit the library, the librarian threatens to throw them out if they make a sound. Chip Whistler attempts to make Cricket lose his job by running Big Coffee out of business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Chipocalypse Now
programme.desc: Chip Whistler tears down the buildings around the Greens' house to build a new Wholesome Foods store.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Puppeteer
programme.desc: A misunderstanding while babysitting Manon leads to a young girl becoming akumatized as The Puppeteer.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Simon Says
programme.desc: Humiliated while performing a hypnotist act on TV, Simon gets akumatized into Simon Says. Now, by uttering a simple phrase, he is able to hypnotize anyone into doing his bidding.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: Griffin Campbell and his family have just uprooted their lives to move to a new town and take ownership of an abandoned hotel in hopes of restoring it to the lively vacation destination it once was.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lou's Still the Boss but Now There's a Ross
programme.desc: Camp director Lou, counselors Ava and Noah and campers Destiny, Matteo and Finn are delighted when Emma, fresh from her glamorous career as a fashion designer in Milan, pays a surprise visit to Camp Kikiwaka.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Whisper Toots
programme.desc: When Noah and Destiny notice Matteo sneaking off into the woods at night, they follow him and soon discover he is moonlighting at Miss Tilly's Inn.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Party Pooper
programme.desc: Lou is invited to a conference for camp directors, where she has been asked to give a speech. She allows Destiny to come with her, but soon regrets that decision.

programme.title: Jessie: Someone Has Tou-pay
programme.desc: Bertram bought a new toupee for his band's big performance, but when it goes missing, Jessie interrogates each of the kids in hopes of finding it.

programme.title: Jessie: Bye Bye Bertie
programme.desc: Bertram has had enough, so decides to quit and to go work for Mrs. Chesterfield. Meanwhile, the Ross family hires a new butler, Roger, who takes his job very seriously.

programme.title: Jessie: Capture the Nag
programme.desc: When the kids are snowed in at the penthouse, an epic game of capture the flag ensues. Allegiances are tested, tricks are pulled and everyone goes a little overboard.

programme.title: Jessie: Four Broke Kids
programme.desc: The Ross family faces an unexpected dilemma when they find out their parents have lost all their money and must learn to live without it.

programme.title: Jessie: Dance, Dance Resolution
programme.desc: It's school dance time, and the Ross family pulls out all the stops to score dates. Meanwhile, Jessie helps Bertram prepare for his first solo at the Metropolitan Opera.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Musclehead Murders
programme.desc: A wealthy Miami couple disappears leaving an abandoned Lamborghini. Police are perplexed until a rich businessman comes forward with a bizarre and torturous tale of a group of muscled men looking for a fast way to flashy cars and a fabulous lifestyle.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Murder in the Keys
programme.desc: Young newlyweds Michael and Susan 'Missy' MacIvor were living the dream in the Florida Keys with a baby on the way. But the Florida Man strikes in paradise, when under the cover of a storm, the MacIvors become victims of a triple homicide.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Killer Succession
programme.desc: A car bomb explodes rocking the millionaire enclave of Naples, Florida. Tobacco heiress Margaret Benson and her son are victims of a double homicide. Her severely injured daughter clings to life, and may be the police’s only hope for an eyewitness.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Dial 911 for Murder
programme.desc: 21 year-old hopeful romantic, Landy Martinez, is caught in a tumultuous and deadly love triangle. At the scene of the crime is a cell phone with the victim on video pleading for his life. Can the police unlock the evidence to convict the killer?

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Twisted Betrayal
programme.desc: When a devoted mother with a bright future in show business is ruthlessly gunned down, a number of suspects emerge, but just as detectives think they have the killer in their sights, the investigation takes a jaw dropping turn.

programme.title: Framed by the Killer: The Sex Cult Frame
programme.desc: A successful entrepreneur is found dead on the side of the road. Surprise clues are found during the autopsy, and investigators soon uncover a devious sex cult and a masterminded revenge plan that leads them to the one killer no one ever suspected.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Fatal Secrets
programme.desc: Investigators in York, Pennsylvania enter a dark world of buried secrets after a couple makes a stunning discovery in their backyard. A brother appears desperate to find his sister, but in a strange twist could lead detectives to a staggering truth.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Grief or Guilt
programme.desc: A beloved high school track star vanishes into the Philadelphia night and those in her innermost circle are eyed as suspects. When a terrifying scene is unearthed in the nearby woods, a family demands answers, but nobody is prepared for the truth. .

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder: Divided By Love
programme.desc: A teenaged Romeo and Juliet defy family differences to marry and have a baby boy, but their joy is shattered when violence rips the family apart. Decades pass before the cold case finally gets a lead that reveals deep family secrets and a web of lies.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder: A Secret to Kill For
programme.desc: Happy newlyweds are renovating a house for their future family when tragedy strikes. It isn’t until a dark and twisted secret is revealed that justice is served for a devastating double homicide.

programme.title: Framed by the Killer: The Sex Cult Frame
programme.desc: A successful entrepreneur is found dead on the side of the road. Surprise clues are found during the autopsy, and investigators soon uncover a devious sex cult and a masterminded revenge plan that leads them to the one killer no one ever suspected.

programme.title: A Love to Kill For: Gypsy Rose & Nick
Snapped: Killer Couples: Miranda and Elytte Barbour
programme.desc: A twisted sense of justice leads a pair of demented newlyweds to lure an unsuspecting victim on Craigslist.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets in the Snow
programme.desc: Stephanie Bruner, mother and professional dancer went missing in the Colorado Mountains. With three viable suspects in mind, her complicated love triangle may have sealed her fate.

programme.title: Dateline: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: Hannah Hill disappeared from her home in Akron, Ohio in the spring of 1999. One week later Hannah's body was found in the trunk of her own car on the side of the road.

programme.title: Murder for Hire: A Deadly Imagination
programme.desc: Could a writer's obsession with crime bring her darkest fantasy into reality? A self-proclaimed novelist's plot for her husband's untimely death takes an unexpected turn, and a sting operation reveals the twisted truth.

programme.title: License to Kill: A Match Made in Hell
programme.desc: In order to solidify the secret bond keeping them together, two aids working at a nursing home create a twisted murderous game involving the Alzheimer's patients they care for.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Menage-a-Murder
programme.desc: What started as a perfect marriage evolves into a questionable threesome. Soon one of them winds up dead, but the killer who rocked this trio is no one that investigators saw coming.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Deadly Fetish
programme.desc: The wife of a Marine, a pregnant dominatrix and a sex slave cross paths in a twisted tale of kidnapping, lies, and murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Mr. Handcuffs
programme.desc: A mom starts online dating to try and cope after an unexpected tragedy but when she gets pulled into the underbelly of the BDSM world and then disappears, investigators spend over a year unraveling this dark mystery.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder: A Secret to Kill For
programme.desc: Happy newlyweds are renovating a house for their future family when tragedy strikes. It isn’t until a dark and twisted secret is revealed that justice is served for a devastating double homicide.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder: Divided By Love
programme.desc: A teenaged Romeo and Juliet defy family differences to marry and have a baby boy, but their joy is shattered when violence rips the family apart. Decades pass before the cold case finally gets a lead that reveals deep family secrets and a web of lies.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder: Love Me and Never Leave
programme.desc: A dental student rejects her boyfriend's marriage proposal and shortly after a mysterious death that stuns everyone. When another victim dies in similar circumstances 14 years later, investigators must determine if both cases are fatally intertwined.

programme.title: Movie: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles through the normal problems of a high school student while also fighting crime as Spider-Man, using the fantastic suit that billionaire superhero Tony Stark built for him. He chafes under the restrictions that Stark places on him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: My Fair Laddy
programme.desc: The Simpsons take in Groundskeeper Willy after Bart accidentally destroys his house. But soon after his arrival, Willy's poor manners become the focus of a bet between Bart and Lisa, as she takes on the challenge of turning him into a proper gentleman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Seemingly Never-Ending Story
programme.desc: While cave exploring with his family, Homer causes the cave to crumble and finds himself stuck upside down in the ceiling. Marge and Bart search for help, while Lisa passes the time by telling Homer a story, which turns into a chain of narrated tales.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Has Two Mommies
programme.desc: When Ned Flanders wins a new computer, he offers it to Marge because he has no use for it. In return, Marge babysits the Flanders children so that Ned can attend the Left-Handed Convention, where he meets Randy Johnson of the New York Yankees.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Million Dollar Abie
programme.desc: Abe ruins Homer's plans to make Springfield the new home of a pro football franchise when he mistakes the Commissioner of Football for a burglar. After the football stadium is transformed into a bull-fighting arena, Abe seeks help to commit suicide.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kiss Kiss Bang Bangalore
programme.desc: Homer learns that the nuclear power plant is being shut down and outsourced to India. After Homer is sent to train the new employees, he becomes power hungry in his new position of authority.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wettest Stories Ever Told
programme.desc: When the Simpsons' plans for a family outing at the Frying Dutchman turn into a dining disaster, they try to salvage the night by telling different stories of disasters at sea. Lisa recounts the Mayflower voyage, and Bart tells tales of Tahitian mutiny.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girls Just Want to Have Sums
programme.desc: Springfield is in an uproar after Principal Skinner makes a sexist comment at the end of an Itchy and Scratchy musical. Principal Skinner is replaced by Melanie Upfoot, a women's education expert, who divides the school into two different schools.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Regarding Margie
programme.desc: After a spring-cleaning frenzy and inhaling too many fumes, Marge suffers from retrograde amnesia. In an effort to bring back her memory, Homer takes her around town to re-familiarize her with her surroundings.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Monkey Suit
programme.desc: After visiting an evolution exhibit, Flanders pushes Mayor Quimby to appoint Reverend Lovejoy as a "Morality Czar"' in charge of spreading the theory of creationism. Darwin's theories are outlawed and Lisa is the only supporter of the theory.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Mook, the Chef, the Wife and Her Homer
programme.desc: After Lisa befriends Fat Tony's son Michael, Fat Tony invites the Simpsons over for dinner as a sign of gratitude. Shockingly, Fat Tony is shot by a rival family moments after Michael admits he would rather be a chef than take over the family business.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Jazzy and the Pussycats
programme.desc: When Bart turns a quiet funeral into a chaotic mess, his parents are faced with a mob of angry Springfieldians who have had enough. Homer and Marge look to a child psychiatrist for help, who suggests that Bart take up drumming to channel his energy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Please Homer, Don't Hammer 'Em
programme.desc: Hoping to see a new side to Homer, Marge convinces him to buy a refined collection of carpentry books. To Marge's dismay, the books only gather dust until she accidentally breaks a nightstand and uses the books to fix it herself.

programme.title: Family Guy: Holly Bibble
programme.desc: Cooped up in a hotel room due to a big storm, the Griffins pass the time by reimagining three stories from the Bible.

programme.title: Family Guy: Movin' in (Principal Shepherd's Song)
programme.desc: Principal Shepherd moves in with the Griffins after he is fired for fat-shaming Chris at school. Meanwhile, Brian sues Stewie for writing a series of children's books which portray him as an idiot.

programme.title: Archer: Skorpio
programme.desc: Archer must rescue Lana from the clutches of Skorpio, the infamous arms dealer. Meanwhile, Cyril fears not only for his girlfriend's life, but her succumbing to the seductive nature of Archer's heroics.

programme.title: Archer: Skytanic
programme.desc: When a bomb threat jeopardizes the maiden voyage of the luxury airship Excelsior, Archer and the ISIS crew must battle the clock (and each other) to avert disaster.

programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Temple of Terror
programme.desc: A mysterious explosion rocks the streets in Cambodia and it may be linked to a temple complex. Motorcyclists encounter what may be a legendary humanoid cannibal, and a cursed mineshaft could explain paranormal activity in a town's antique center.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Wreckage of Chaos
programme.desc: Dashcam footage captures a massive disc-shaped object falling from the sky and smashing onto a busy Bangkok highway; using the latest imaging tech, experts investigate to reveal if this is evidence of a crashing UFO or something even more bizarre.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Phantoms of Chernobyl
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to the large town located just outside of Chernobyl on the eve of disaster, a fleet of ghost ships, and a dangerous mountain road that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Tesla Conspiracy
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a cutting-edge research complex built by a visionary genius, an ambitious Nazi project that met a sinister end, and a Cold War relic that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Greatest Icons
programme.desc: Places that were once home to Hollywood films and world-famous musicians are now run-down, abandoned, and forbidden; experts investigate their mysteries and reveal the astonishing secrets behind ten of the world's most iconic abandoned places.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: A family's search for new beginnings backfires when their move from Hawaii to Alaska creates an environment perfect for murder.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Good Sister
programme.desc: Sisters who've lived together for nearly 40 years have a deadly falling out over a plan to move to the beach.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Old River Road
programme.desc: A hit-and-run accident looks suspiciously like murder after police discover evidence of blunt force trauma and interview two sisters who can't keep a secret.

programme.title: American Monster: My Body
programme.desc: Sandy Miles and her daughter Tracie are as close as can be. But when Tracie vanishes and Sandy is found brutally murdered, the truth behind the killing is more horrific than investigators can possibly imagine.

programme.title: American Monster: Don't Forget Me
programme.desc: On the day before he's to start a new job, a father-of-two disappears with no warning. His wife has no idea where he went. His friends hint that he led a secret, sordid life. But it remains a mystery for years - until a tip reveals the jaw-dropping truth.

programme.title: American Monster: Everyone's Favorite Uncle
programme.desc: When wealthy bachelor Steve Clayton meets homely VA nurse Lana Walsh, it's love at first sight. But the devoted couple aren't immune to life's tragedies, and when an untimely death raises questions, an unsettling and devastating secret is revealed.

programme.title: Onision: In Real Life: discovery+ 1st Look: Banana Power

programme.title: American Monster: Out of His Shell
programme.desc: Doting parents Brett and Mona Wehde live a quiet life in sleepy rural Iowa raising their three children. When a new family arrives, relationships flourish, but behind closed doors a wicked plot is hatched that soon destroys life as they know it forever.

programme.title: American Monster: Falling Down
programme.desc: Alene and George Jenkins are the perfect couple living a perfect life. When their desire for children leads them to adopt a son and a daughter it seems their family is complete. But instead it triggers a dark spiral ending in an unspeakably awful crime.

programme.title: Onision: In Real Life: discovery+ 1st Look: Banana Power
programme.desc: Greg Jackson, aka Onision, has become one of YouTube's most controversial figures. After skyrocketing to Internet fame in the mid-2000s, the content creator begins a relationship with an underage fan named Shiloh.

programme.title: American Monster: Stay with Me

programme.title: American Monster: My Body
programme.desc: Sandy Miles and her daughter Tracie are as close as can be. But when Tracie vanishes and Sandy is found brutally murdered, the truth behind the killing is more horrific than investigators can possibly imagine.

programme.title: The Murderous Mr. Handcuffs

programme.title: The Body in the Bathtub
programme.desc: Just four days after Christina Sanoubane and her young son move into their new apartment, a friend comes to visit and finds her son alone and Christina brutally murdered. Now investigators must determine who would have wanted this 20-year-old mother dead.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lie For Me
programme.desc: Air Force veteran Michael Giles disappears along with his savings of $206,000. Detectives discover a woman named Kwaneta Harris has been draining the man's accounts. But as they dig deeper, detectives uncover a massive conspiracy of greed and murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Lies
programme.desc: In 2015, Detective Scott Sanderson finds himself solving one of the strangest cases of his career. At its center are a newborn and her missing mother. Before long he'll uncover a diabolical scheme that will destroy the lives of everyone it touches.

programme.title: Diabolical: Masking Evil
programme.desc: A burning car is found by the side of a highway on the same night a single mother of two is reported missing. These two events are connected, and connecting the dots will lead investigators to a notorious criminal who has been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Conscience
programme.desc: A look at some women who killed without a conscience.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Eternal Revenge
programme.desc: When a virtuous woman is seduced, a lover betrayed, and an 'old' wife replaced by a 'new' one, the lives of the men who caused the hurt are destroyed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Souls of Stone

programme.title: Deadly Women: Heartless
programme.desc: These women's actions were so cruel they were almost unbelievable. Their callous acts proved they were 'Heartless'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Twisted Desires

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Five Months of Hell

programme.title: Hollywood vs. Commies
programme.desc: The amazing story of how Hollywood took on Communism and played a key role in winning the Cold War.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Bad Temper

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Ninth Place at Poker

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got That Tough Girl Look

programme.title: Movie: One Winter Proposal

programme.title: The Office: Two Weeks

programme.title: The Office: Cafe Disco

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry

programme.desc: Bride Saba needs a dress that fits her conservative Ethiopian culture, but still wants something fun and sexy for the reception. Bride Tiffany's family is too far away to help her shop, so Lori and Monte stand in for her Mom and Dad.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: 88 and Out at the Gate
programme.desc: Lori and Monte head to Nashville to help country artist Jimmy Stanley with a surprise proposal to fellow country singer Kristen Kelley. She also gets another surprise from Lori and Monte that she never sees coming.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: If I Feel Like a Penny, I Need to Look Like a Million
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer is a breast cancer survivor who wants to show off her curves, but Mom prefers her mounds to be covered. Bride Jasmine's mom has always questioned her style, but Lori suspects that's not the only reason she's doubting this bride's vision.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Gone With the Wind Fabulous
programme.desc: Returning raucous bride Stacy is back again to find another dress to reflect her motorcycle-chic style. Bride Jessica wants a modern dress for her beach wedding but her mother-in-law is set on tradition.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Two Montes are Better Than None
programme.desc: Bride Katherine wants a vintage dress she can wear with cowboy boots, but her BFF is pushing for a glamorous Parisian-inspired gown. Bride Dawn's son is a mini-fashionista who gives Monte a run for his money as he seeks out the perfect dress for his mom.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Trio of Options
programme.desc: Bride Katy brought along her stylish Aunt Kristin to shop. Bride Genine falls in love with a dress but her sort-of-psychic friend isn't sure. Meanwhile Monte helps bride Gretchen tailor her dress to perfection.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Waiting for a Sign
programme.desc: Lori and Monte hit the road with a pop-up salon in tow to surprise a very special bride who is getting married in just two days. Due to a recent tragedy, bride Anna has not taken the time to find a dress, but Team BBL is certain they can save the day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Little Sparkle Goes a Long Way
programme.desc: YouTube sensation and bride BFFTaylor won't feel satisfied with her dress until her mom cries. Olympian bride Kellie Wells comes in tow with Team Conservative and Team Sexy, and she must please them both or risk leaving empty-handed.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Mother of the Groom

programme.desc: Guy Fieri cruises the States to check out some Far-East flavours. In Seattle, a funky chicken spot puts an Asian spin on poultry. A family-run gem dishes out righteous Thai specialties on the big island of Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Sampling Of Spain
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels all the way to Barcelona, Spain, for a sampling of Spanish cooking. He digs into everything from top-notch tapas, like prawns and quail, to traditional Catalan specialties, like mouth-watering meatballs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Meat and Sweet Treats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into mega meat and a little bit of sweet. In Atlanta, a Korean-taqueria mashing up unique flavors in their chicken tacos and bulgogi fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Top Ten Burgers
programme.desc: Guy's had a lot of burgers on DDD and we asked you to vote for your Top 10 favourites of all time. From old school to gourmet, it's a countdown of the most creative and delicious combinations found in Flavortown.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real-Deal Diners
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's traveling the country hitting up real-deal diners. From coast to coast and everywhere in-between, these all-American staples are servin' up the bomb breakfasts and classic comfort food, with a few surprises mixed into the menu.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef, Lamb And Pig
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going for all kinds of meaty favourites. In Louisville, Kentucky, a real-deal Irish pub serves up cottage pie and a lamb-cabbage specialty. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky spot puts out flavourful Asian-barbecue fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seaside Eats
programme.desc: Menu includes: fried clams; crab cakes; lobster chow mein.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: In the Family
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out a Baltimore diner that's famous for their pit beef with Duff Goldman.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy goes to Orlando to visit an authentic Vietnamese spot serving phenomenal pho and a beefy specialty, and to Palm Springs to visit an atypical burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Surf and Turf
programme.desc: It's a mix of land and sea as Guy Fieri pops into a few favourite spots across the country. In Portland, Ore., a chef full of personality is still making people smile with seafood for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Wings 'n' Things
programme.desc: Ain't no thing but a chicken wing in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, when Guy Fieri stops by to taste a couple of new eats they've added. A Nashville barbecue spot has a new take on the old standard wings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handy Helpings
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri grabs a fistful of righteous hand-held toppings starting with a kolach cafe in Salt Lake City cooking up their Czech specialties with some sweetness and comfort.

programme.desc: Guy tries favourites in Chicago, a Peruvian place and visits Oklahoma City.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Breakfast for Supper
programme.desc: Trisha and her friend Donna make some easy to assemble breakfast dishes, that are hearty enough for dinner.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Lunch With Aunt T
programme.desc: When Trisha Yearwood's niece Ashley first moved to Nashville, she would text Aunt T for recipe ideas and ways to make meals that last on a college student's budget. They're demonstrating these recipes and showing incredible ways to meal prep for the week.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Lazy Sunday Dinner
programme.desc: Valerie and her husband create a lazy Sunday meal that allows them to use up food in their fridge in order to save time and money. The menu includes pot roast with veggies, green beans with shallots, stuffed mushrooms, and apricot clafouti.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Cook Once, Eat for a Week
programme.desc: On Sundays, Valerie Bertinelli loves to make a big pot of her Nonnie's favourite marinara sauce and repurpose it all week in modern interpretations of her Nonnie's most-memorable weeknight meals.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Underappreciated
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shines a spotlight on unsung hero ingredients. Canned foods reveal hidden talents in her Salmon burgers and spam fried rice. Then Ree uses a freezer star in a spinach mushroom quiche, and a baking mix takes the lead in chocolate chip scones.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Other Cuts Of Beef
programme.desc: Ree's transforming random cuts of beef into four delicious dishes. She's turning stew beef into slow cooker Sunday stew and serving it with fabulous buttery parsley lemon noodles.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cheap And Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has been stocking up for four make-ahead meals that are as cheap as they are easy to make. There's inexpensive slow cooker teriyaki ribs with quick slaw, Tex-Mex meatballs, BBQ chicken baked potatoes and a cheesy rigatoni pepper bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Waste Not, Want Not
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is reclaiming kitchen scraps and transforming them into star dishes. Peels, stems and bones destined for the trash are instead turned into crispy roasted potato peels, stir fried broccoli stems and an awesome all-purpose chicken broth.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Picnic Blowout
programme.desc: Molly Yeh starts the day off with cheesy breakfast juicy Lucys for herself and her husband, Nick. Then she assembles a picnic with pickle dip fried bologna sandwiches, falafel-y farfalle and colorful tie-dye cookies.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Money Savers
programme.desc: Trisha's nephews return to the kitchen to learn some budget-friendly & belly-filling recipes. Trisha shows how to stretch a dollar with dishes including garlic popcorn, breakfast burritos, PBJ smoothies, Thai peanut butter ramen & peanut butter mug cake.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Double as Nice for Half the Price
programme.desc: Kardea Bown cooks up her cousin's favorite restaurant meal, all for under $30! On the menu is a starter of sea island beer steamed mussels and a main course of penne with sausage and greens. For dessert, there's homemade molten chocolate cakes.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Fancy for Less
programme.desc: Kardea invites her notoriously frugal Aunt TC over for a dinner that looks like a million bucks but won't break the bank! For their fancy meal at home, Kardea makes Molasses Salmon, Mushroom and Pea Risotto, and Wilted Bok Choy.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Price Crunch Challenge
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts compete to make the most-affordable meal that doesn't skimp on flavour. Alex Guarnaschelli starts the competition with her meaty, cheesy stuffed peppers and Geoffrey Zakarian makes breakfast for dinner with a family-sized omelette.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Cash Strapped
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli challenges four chefs to transport the judges from the hot asphalt to a tropical paradise. Then, the chefs' fate is in their own hands to create a handheld dish, and the last two standing whip up sweet treats.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Resolution Royale
programme.desc: Four chefs arrive in Flavortown ready to prove that traditionally unhealthy dishes can be made healthier and even more delicious.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Those Fancy Japanese Toilets

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Village of Wolves
programme.desc: Villalobos is tested like never before when Tia and her crew are called upon to rescue a pack of wolf-dog hybrids abandoned by a backyard breeder. With law enforcement threatening to kill the dogs, the pressure is higher than ever.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Dogs Who Made Us
programme.desc: This special episode takes a look at the dogs that will always hold a loving place in the family's hearts. From the first pit bull that Tia rescued to the dog that walked Tania down the aisle, family members share why each dog is so important to them.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: The family of Mutt, an employee who recently passed away, meets the dog that he chose for them. A stray near a middle school leads Tia and M2 on a wild good chase. And, Lizzy and Moe tackle the challenging task of renovating the dog agility course.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Never Too Late
programme.desc: Lizzy tries to track down the owner of a dog tied up outside the rescue. An older couple comes looking for their first dog, but their choice requires some special temperament testing. And, when a dog develops allergies, Mariah looks for a natural cure.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: Tia and M2 take to the water to prepare a pit bull for her forever home. A new parolee comes to Villalobos from Boston, hoping stay on track so that he can make his teenage son proud. A stray dog is near death when Lizzy and Heidi find him.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl XVII Presents: Pupularity Playoffs: Week 2
Pit Bulls & Parolees: No Wolf Left Behind
programme.desc: When over 50 hybrid hounds are found abandoned in Texas, Tia is faced with her most challenging rescue to date and is determined to find the best solution before it's too late. At Villalobos, Tania and Mariah help a lonely man adopt a furever friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Home Is Where the Dog Is
programme.desc: One of Earl's favourite senior dogs finally has a chance at a forever home. Tia heads to a small shelter in rural Louisiana to help with a hound that they took in. Tania, Mariah and Lizzy take on a project that showcases dogs in their forever homes.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: No Wolf Left Behind
programme.desc: When over 50 hybrid hounds are found abandoned in Texas, Tia is faced with her most challenging rescue to date and is determined to find the best solution before it's too late. At Villalobos, Tania and Mariah help a lonely man adopt a furever friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Tia recruits some help to rescue a pit bull for the bottom of a 40-foot hole. Then, Mariah helps Tia with an adoption to a young couple who are still reeling from the loss of their dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A New Future
programme.desc: Tia brings in reinforcements to rescue a dog from a dangerous part of New Orleans. Tania is left stunned when she becomes the center of attention at her boyfriend's birthday party.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Almost Perfect
programme.desc: Tia and two parolees scramble to rescue a dog left for dead in a dangerous part of town. A college girl from South Carolina comes looking to adopt a special needs dog. And, the parolees scramble when a dog is dumped on the rescue center's doorstep.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Not Meant to Be
programme.desc: An adopter from Texas fails to connect with the dog he drove hundreds of miles to adopt - but Tia might have the perfect match.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: A Test of Strength
programme.desc: Officer Demler helps a hiker with a severe shoulder injury. Officer Fluette and K-9 Moxie take their certification test. Officer Holmes and trainee Frye look for evidence of an illegal deer kill. Officer MacFadzen bonds with his son on a hunting trip.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Coastal Criminals
programme.desc: Officer James Benvenuti chases down two lobster poachers in Rye. In a puzzling case, Officer Graham Courtney investigates a man on the beach found covered in blood. And Sergeant Adam Cheney attempts to apprehend trespassers on the railroad tracks.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Invisible Evidence
programme.desc: Officer Egan investigates the mysterious death of a deer. Officer Courtney and Lt. Cheney help a seal stuck in a tidal creek. Officer Bronson catches a young fisherman in a lie. And Officers lead the search for a woman with a head injury.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Lieutenant Boudreau and trainee Crouse investigate a man who shot someone while hunting illegally. Sergeant Lucas responds to a porcupine wreaking havoc. Later, when a seriously ill hiker is trapped on Mount Garfield, Officer Holmes races to the scene.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Danger at Dawn
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Benny Richards is committed to conserving Texas wildlife. Game Warden Albert Flores enforces fishing laws. Game Warden Jennifer Provaznik schools anglers. Game Warden Jayme Deschaaf makes sure dove hunters follow the laws.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Drug Run River
programme.desc: Game wardens Gould and Hickerson chase drug smugglers that crossed the Rio Grande River. Game warden Boone checks out an injured bird. Game warden Damron relocates a feisty marsupial and her babies. Amundson and Poole meet a fan.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbour in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk. Game Warden Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant. Game Warden Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River. Wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Count's Car Show

programme.title: Jessie: The Fear in Our Stars

programme.title: Jessie: Jessie Goes to Hollywood
programme.desc: When Christina Ross returns home, Jessie heads to L.A. for a role in a movie. When the kids realize that they still need her, however, they follow Jessie to Hollywood.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Quiet Please/ Chipwrecked
programme.desc: When the Greens visit the library, the librarian threatens to throw them out if they make a sound. Chip Whistler attempts to make Cricket lose his job by running Big Coffee out of business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Chipocalypse Now
programme.desc: Chip Whistler tears down the buildings around the Greens' house to build a new Wholesome Foods store.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted

programme.desc: Remy's plan for his whole life is thrown into question when he is unprepared for a violin recital. Later, Gramma becomes a rideshare driver, only to find her best customers are thieves.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Baking Bad
programme.desc: Booker, Nia and Tess discover a baking blogger is passing Nia's photo off as their own social media avatar while writing mean-spirited reviews. The kids try to unmask the culprit before Nia's real-life reputation is jeopardized.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Big Little Surprise

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Blood Is Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: When the bond between twin brothers proves stronger than the one between a husband and wife, true love takes a tragic, deadly turn.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception
programme.desc: When Jean Claude Dominique is the victim of a hit-and-run, his wife Eliette rushes to his side. It's there she comes face-to-face with his OTHER wife. It's her first glimpse into his double life that leads to her fighting for her own.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Mastermind
programme.desc: LAPD investigators are on the hunt for a criminal stealing expensive yachts, but what they find instead is a mild mannered man among their own ranks… who's involved in a lot more than just boat theft.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Never Coming Home
programme.desc: A mother and her two young sons vanish in rural Wyoming, prompting a nationwide search. Leads dry up and the case goes cold... until a dark secret is revealed, leading investigators to another homicide they had no clue could solve four murders.

programme.title: James Patterson's Till Murder Do Us Part: Two-Faced
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a San Francisco businessman is found floating in the California Aqueduct. Investigators initially suspect a family member, but without evidence, the case goes cold. It will take detectives several decades to find the real killer.

programme.title: James Patterson's Till Murder Do Us Part: The Darkside
programme.desc: In 1991, Brandi McClain falls in love with a handsome and famous skateboarder known as 'Gator.' Though Gator claims to find God with the help of a well-meaning preacher, no one knows that his dark side lurks dangerously close to the surface.

programme.title: James Patterson's Till Murder Do Us Part: No Good Deed
programme.desc: In 2009, one woman's long and painful struggle to overcome addiction and help others ends in a way no one ever saw coming.

programme.title: James Patterson's Till Murder Do Us Part: Two-Faced
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a San Francisco businessman is found floating in the California Aqueduct. Investigators initially suspect a family member, but without evidence, the case goes cold. It will take detectives several decades to find the real killer.
